## Type of Change

<!-- Please add a label to this PR to control semantic versioning: -->
<!-- - `major` for breaking changes (v1.0.0 → v2.0.0) -->
<!-- - `minor` for new features (v1.0.0 → v1.1.0) -->
<!-- - `patch` for bug fixes (v1.0.0 → v1.0.1) -->
<!-- - `skip-release` to skip creating a release -->

<!-- Alternatively, use conventional commit format in the PR title: -->
<!-- - feat!: or BREAKING CHANGE → major -->
<!-- - feat: → minor -->
<!-- - fix:, chore:, docs: → patch -->

<!-- Automation labels: -->
<!-- - `merge when ready` - Auto-merge PR when all checks pass -->
<!-- - `autorelease` - Explicit marker that release is intended (informational) -->

- [ ] Breaking change (major version bump)
- [ ] New feature (minor version bump)
- [ ] Bug fix or minor change (patch version bump)
- [ ] Documentation or non-code change (consider `skip-release` label)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Added appropriate label (`major`, `minor`, `patch`, or `skip-release`) for semantic versioning
